title: Oreo's Pirates
description: Ahoy, matey! This Minecraft modpack brings pirates to your world! Explore treacherous oceans, battle rival crews, and hunt for buried treasure. Craft ships, uncover ancient maps, and become a legendary pirate captain!
body:
# About the mod


Ahoy, matey! Prepare to hoist the Jolly Roger and set sail for adventure in a Minecraft world teeming with pirates! This modpack plunges you into a thrilling era of swashbuckling and buried treasure.  Explore treacherous oceans, discover hidden coves, and battle rival pirate crews for dominance of the high seas.  Craft mighty ships, from humble sloops to formidable galleons, and customize them with cannons, sails, and all the piratey trimmings.  Uncover ancient maps leading to legendary loot, but beware, for cursed artifacts and cunning traps await those who dare to seek them.  Will you become a feared pirate captain, or will you succumb to the perils of the deep?  The fate of the seven seas is in your hands!  Download now and embark on your pirate adventure!



**Note:None of mods belong to me**
